items.title: Musk's bad week: Tesla suffers worst slump since 2022, SpaceX drops ahead of Starship test flight
items.summary: Tesla shares plunged almost 18% this week after the company missed on earnings and turned cash flow negative.
items.label: earnings

items.title: Paramount agrees to delay WBD acquisition to as late as June 2027 amid legal challenge
items.summary: Paramount previously said it intended to complete its WBD acquisition by the end of September, but said Friday the agreement is a "significant win."
items.label: mna

items.title: 1 hyperscaler megacap down, 3 to go. Alphabet raises the stakes on AI spending
items.summary: "Capex trends are going to be the number one focus," Club portfolio director Jeff Marks said Friday ahead of next week's Big Tech earnings.
items.label: earnings

items.title: Trump threatens EU with 'substantial TARIFF' for 'ROBBING' U.S. tech giants
items.summary: Trump on Truth Social railed against the European Union's new fine on Google and prior penalties against U.S. tech giants Apple, Meta and Amazon.
items.label: policy

items.title: Trader who successfully shorted Tesla into earnings now sets sights on this high flyer
items.summary: The bearish Tesla set-up we flagged ahead of Wednesday's report has delivered most of what it can.
items.label: earnings

items.title: Trump's new global tariff draws rebukes from trade partners over forced labor justification
items.summary: U.S. trading partners have rejected the forced labor rationale behind Trump's new global tariffs, while most signaled plans to keep negotiating.
items.label: policy

items.title: These 16 states are offering tax-free shopping days as back-to-school costs soar to over $800 per student
items.summary: As inflation continues to squeeze household budgets, parents and students are on a mission to find back-to-school bargains.
items.label: macro

items.title: Why Costco keeps gas prices so low—it's 'straight out of the retail playbook,' expert says
items.summary: Higher gas prices are driving record demand for Costco's gas stations as more Americans look to save at the pump.
items.label: earnings

items.title: Nvidia, Microsoft, Meta warn against 'premature restrictions' of open-weight models
items.summary: Chinese open-weight models are gaining steam against leading offerings from American companies. OpenAI and Anthropic did not sign the letter.
items.label: capital

items.title: Anthropic's new AI model rivals Fable 5 and is cheaper as businesses fret about costs
items.summary: Anthropic said Claude Opus 5 is its best performing and its most cost-effective offering.
items.label: capital

items.title: Oil shipments are under attack on multiple fronts as fighting escalates in Red Sea, Hormuz and Black Sea
items.summary: More than 60 commercial ships have been attacked in the Persian Gulf, Strait of Hormuz and Gulf of Oman since March 1.
items.label: product

items.title: Amazon cracks down on use of AI images by sellers after New York law
items.summary: A recently enacted New York law mandates that companies disclose when an ad includes a "synthetic performer" in place of a human actor.
items.label: market

items.title: Moody's says 'unprecedented' AI spending threatens credit quality of Amazon, Meta, Alphabet and others
items.summary: Moody's said AI spending is forcing even the world's most cash-rich corporations to lean heavily on debt, stock sales and off-balance-sheet moves.
items.label: other

items.title: ‘It’s nothing personal’: Should I tell my 96-year-old stepmother that I don’t want her inheritance?
items.summary: “I would likely be the one responsible for dealing with the house.”
items.label: other

items.title: ‘We are not romantically involved’: I’m marrying my platonic best friend of 20 years. Should I leave him my home?
items.summary: “I own my home outright, have no children or other dependents.”
